title: The Emerald Cascade
description: Artisanally crafted with ethically sourced 24k gold filigree and teardrop Zambian emeralds.
imageAltData: Macro close-up of a 24k gold chandelier earring with intricate filigree work and a single emerald drop against a soft cream silk background

title: Surya Heritage Band
description: A heavy, hand-beaten gold band featuring solar motifs inspired by ancient temple architecture.
imageAltData: Stack of hand-engraved solid gold bangles lying on a dark textured wood surface with dramatic sunlight hitting the metal edges

title: Lunar Solitude
description: A single rose-cut diamond suspended by a whisper-thin platinum chain.
imageAltData: Minimalist diamond pendant necklace draped over a white marble bust, soft morning light creating gentle shadows

title: Vermillion Bloom
description: Floral-inspired ring with ruby petals and a yellow sapphire core.
imageAltData: High-fashion macro photo of a ruby cocktail ring on a dark velvet cushion, glowing crimson stones surrounded by gold petals

title: Geometric Heritage
description: Where modern lines meet traditional goldsmithing techniques.
imageAltData: Modern geometric gold earrings displayed against a neutral linen background with organic shadows of palm leaves
